scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bmad-todo/shared build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @bmad-todo/shared build && pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @bmad-todo/shared build && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
